name: NYC 311 Service Requests
refresh: NYC Open Data 311 Service Requests (erm2-nwe9), automated daily refresh
notes: Live 311 service requests near the user, from the NYC Open Data Socrata dataset erm2-nwe9 ('311 Service Requests from 2010 to Present'). No key required; sends X-App-Token only if NYC_OPENDATA_APP_TOKEN is set (raises rate limits, otherwise dropped). The {lat}/{lng} tokens in the SoQL $where are substituted with the user's coordinates by lib/nyc311/registry.ts before fetch; within_circle(location, …) scopes to a ~2km radius, newest first. Confirmed live 2026-06-21: response is a root JSON array; fields include unique_key, created_date, complaint_type, descriptor, agency_name, incident_address, borough, status, latitude, longitude. NOTE: daily refresh (≈1 day lag), not real-time. To switch to the api.nyc.gov nyc-311-public-api GetAssets operation instead, replace adapter.url/query/fieldMap with that operation's schema and set headers to { "Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key": "${NYC_311_KEY}" }.
